creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193032
Patch adding LICENSE to x11/setxkbmap

Actually, the license is not a modern version of MIT. It is an old variant of it.[1]

According to the Fedora project wiki they are "functionally identical."[2]

Gentoo uses MIT as well.[3]

[1]: https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Licensing:MIT#Old_Style_.28no_advertising_without_permission.29
[2]: https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Licensing:MIT
[3]: https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/x11-apps/setxkbmap
